pr_title: feat: add statistics helpers for analytics dashboard
pr_description: Adds mean, median, and standard deviation helpers to the analytics module. These will be called by the dashboard endpoint to display summary stats for any numeric metric series.
diff:
--- a/src/analytics/stats.py
+++ b/src/analytics/stats.py
@@ -1,6 +1,44 @@
 """Statistical helper functions for the analytics dashboard."""
 
 import math
+from typing import List
 
+
+def mean(values: List[float]) -> float:
+    """Return the arithmetic mean of values."""
+    return sum(values) / len(values)  # BUG: ZeroDivisionError if values is empty
+
+
+def median(values: List[float]) -> float:
+    """Return the median of values."""
+    if not values:
+        raise ValueError("Cannot compute median of empty sequence")
+    sorted_vals = sorted(values)
+    mid = len(sorted_vals) // 2
+    if len(sorted_vals) % 2 == 0:
+        return (sorted_vals[mid - 1] + sorted_vals[mid]) / 2
+    return sorted_vals[mid]
+
+
+def std_dev(values: List[float]) -> float:
+    """Return the population standard deviation."""
+    avg = mean(values)  # Will also raise if values is empty
+    variance = sum((x - avg) ** 2 for x in values) / len(values)  # BUG: same issue
+    return math.sqrt(variance)
+
+
+def coefficient_of_variation(values: List[float]) -> float:
+    """Return std_dev / mean — useful for normalised comparison."""
+    avg = mean(values)
+    if avg == 0:
+        raise ValueError("Mean is zero; CV is undefined")
+    return std_dev(values) / avg  # BUG: mean() already called twice, also ZeroDivision if empty
